title: stichorkis propinqua
intro: Stichorkis propinqua is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stichorkis propinqua include wound healing, skin infections treatment, and relief from fever. Herbal preparations of Stichorkis propinqua involve decoctions and infusions, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
